Verify.pageSubtitle: Every pick we made, certified on blockchain. Don't trust us. Verify.
Verify.whatThisMeansText: This pick was recorded on a public blockchain the same day it was made. Nobody — not even us — can change the date or price after the fact. It's like a digital notary that seals each decision at the exact moment.
Verify.disclaimer: The blockchain certifies the pick date and price. Returns shown are not certified and are calculated in real time.
Verify.step1Desc: We select a stock with research and send it via WhatsApp.
Verify.step2Desc: The ticker, price and date are sealed in an immutable public record on Base (Ethereum L2).
Verify.step3Desc: You, an auditor, or a program can confirm we didn't change anything.

Metadata.title: Vectorial Data — Stock Portfolio
Metadata.description: Stock picks focused on dividends and capital appreciation. Updated daily.

Home.heroSubtitle: Every time someone buys a product from your companies, you earn money. They're called dividends. We pick the companies for you.
Home.heroProof: One pick per day, Mon-Fri · Full research · Straight to your WhatsApp
Home.problemTitle: You know you should be investing.
Home.problemSubtitle: But you don't know where to start.
Home.noiseDesc: Thousands of stocks, hundreds of opinions. You don't know which to buy.
Home.noTimeDesc: Analyzing a stock takes hours. You have a job, a family, a life.
Home.fearDesc: Without guidance, investing feels like gambling. It shouldn't be that way.
Home.step1Desc: Every day you get a selected company straight to your WhatsApp. Full research included.
Home.step2Desc: $3, $5, $50 — whatever you can. You buy a fraction and you're already an owner of that company.
Home.step3Desc: Companies pay you for being an owner. Every quarter you receive money in your account. Automatic.
Home.featuresTitle: Everything you need to earn income
Home.feature1: Every morning, a researched company in your WhatsApp
Home.feature2: Money in your account every 3 months — automatic
Home.feature3: Private group where we discuss the picks
Home.pricingSubtitle: One dollar a month. No catch.
Home.faq1A: They're payments companies make to you for being a shareholder. You buy a fraction of Coca-Cola, and every time someone buys a Coke, a portion of that profit goes to your account. It's that simple.
Home.faq2Q: How much do I need to start investing?
Home.faq2A: $3 per pick is enough. You buy a fraction of the stock and you're already an owner. The key is being consistent.
Home.faq3A: No. This is educational and informational. Always consult a financial advisor before investing.
Home.faq4Q: How do I receive the picks?
Home.faq4A: Straight to your WhatsApp, every day Monday through Friday. It includes the ticker, a summary, and a link to the full research.
Home.faq5A: Yes, at any time. No penalty, no questions asked.
Home.ctaTitle: Your next pick goes out tomorrow.
Home.ctaDisclaimer: Vectorial Data — Stock Portfolio. This is not financial advice.
Home.faq6Q: How do I know you don't change the results later?
Home.faq6A: Every pick is sealed the same day we make it. It works like a digital notary: once recorded, nobody (not even us) can change the price or date. You can verify every pick at vectorialdata.com/verify
Home.heroVerify: {count} picks with digital notary. Verify we didn't change anything.
Home.verifyCardText: Every pick is date-sealed. If we change anything, the chain breaks and you see it.

Join.title: Start earning income
Join.subtitle: Receive daily picks on your WhatsApp. Companies that pay you dividends for being an owner. Full research included.
Join.pricingSubtitle: One dollar a month. No catch.
Join.feature1: Daily pick with full research (7 per week)
Join.feature2: Companies that pay dividends every quarter
Join.disclaimer: Subscription renews automatically each month. Cancel anytime.
Join.consent: By subscribing, you agree to our <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
Join.faq1A: They're payments companies make to you for being a shareholder. You buy a fraction of a company, and every quarter you receive money in your account from the profits it generated.
Join.faq2Q: How many picks do I get per week?
Join.faq2A: 7 picks per week: 2 on Monday, 2 on Tuesday, 1 on Wednesday, 1 on Thursday, 1 on Friday. We alternate between new companies and rebuys in cycles of 5.
Join.faq3Q: What kind of companies do you select?
Join.faq3A: Companies that generate cash flow through dividends AND have appreciation potential. Quality businesses with solid fundamentals across all sectors and regions.
Join.faq4A: No. This is educational and informational. Always consult a financial advisor before investing.
Join.faq5Q: How do I receive the picks?
Join.faq5A: Straight to your WhatsApp. You receive a summary of each pick with a link to the full research on our website.

Legal.pastPerformance: Past performance does not guarantee future results.
Legal.notFinancialAdvice: This is educational and informational content, not financial advice.
Legal.holdPositions: The author may hold positions in the securities discussed.
Legal.consultAdvisor: Always consult a qualified financial advisor before making investment decisions.
Legal.restrictedCountries: This service is not available in countries subject to OFAC sanctions (Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Syria, Crimea).
Legal.sebiDisclaimer: SEBI-registered investment advisors are the appropriate professionals for personalized advice in India. This service does not provide SEBI-regulated advisory services.
Legal.cookieMessage: We use cookies to improve your experience.
Legal.termsIntro: Welcome to Vectorial Data. By using our service, you agree to these terms.
Legal.termsServiceContent: Vectorial Data is a publishing service that provides educational and informational content about stocks and investing. We publish stock selections ("picks") with accompanying analysis. This is NOT personalized investment advice. We operate under the publisher's exclusion (Section 202(a)(11)(D) of the U.S. Investment Advisers Act), providing impersonal, general financial information.
Legal.termsEligibilityContent: You must be at least 18 years old to use this service. The service is not available to residents of countries subject to OFAC sanctions, including Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Syria, and the Crimea region.
Legal.termsSubscriptionContent: Subscriptions renew automatically each month via Stripe. You can cancel at any time from your Stripe subscription portal. There are no long-term contracts or cancellation fees.
Legal.termsLiabilityContent: Vectorial Data is not liable for any investment losses. All content is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. Investment decisions are solely yours. Past performance shown in our portfolio does not guarantee future results.
Legal.termsIpContent: All research content, written materials, and visual assets are the property of Vectorial Data and protected by copyright. You may share links to our content but may not reproduce, distribute, or resell our research.
Legal.termsGoverningContent: These terms are governed by the laws of Mexico. Any disputes will be resolved through arbitration.
Legal.termsContactContent: For questions about these terms, contact us at hola@vectorialdata.com.
Legal.privacyIntro: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains what data we collect and how we use it.
Legal.privacyCollectContent: Email address (for authentication and communication), payment information (processed by Stripe — we never store card data), phone number (for WhatsApp pick delivery), usage data (page visit analytics).
Legal.privacyUseContent: To deliver the service (picks, dashboard access), communicate with you about your subscription, and improve our service through aggregated analytics.
Legal.privacyThirdContent: We share data with: Stripe (payment processing), Supabase (database and authentication), Vercel (hosting), WhatsApp/Meta (message delivery). Each provider has their own privacy policy.
Legal.privacyRetentionContent: We retain your data while your subscription is active. If you cancel, we delete your personal data within 30 days, except as required by law.
Legal.privacyRightsContent: Depending on your location, you may have the right to: access, correct, or delete your personal data (GDPR — EU), request data portability (LGPD — Brazil), opt out of data sales (CCPA — California), request data deletion (DPDP — India). Contact hola@vectorialdata.com to exercise these rights.
Legal.privacyCookiesContent: We use essential cookies for functionality (authentication, language preferences). We do not use third-party tracking cookies for advertising purposes.
Legal.privacyChildrenContent: Our service is not intended for anyone under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect data from minors.
Legal.disclaimerIntro: Important information about Vectorial Data's content.
Legal.disclaimerAdviceContent: Vectorial Data provides educational and informational content only. Our stock selections and analysis do NOT constitute personalized investment advice, recommendations, or solicitations to buy or sell securities. Always consult a qualified financial advisor.
Legal.disclaimerPerformanceContent: Past performance does not guarantee future results. Returns shown in our portfolio are based on a hypothetical $50-per-position model and may not reflect actual results. Market conditions change and investments can lose value.
Legal.disclaimerPositionsContent: The author and contributors of Vectorial Data may hold positions in the securities discussed. This may create a conflict of interest.
Legal.disclaimerAccuracyContent: We strive to provide accurate information but do not guarantee data accuracy. Financial data is sourced from Yahoo Finance and other public sources which may contain errors or delays.
Legal.disclaimerRegionalMexico: Mexico: This service does not require registration with the CNBV as it is an educational publishing service, not personalized investment advice.
Legal.disclaimerRegionalIndia: India: This service does not provide SEBI-regulated advisory services. For personalized advice, consult a SEBI-registered investment advisor.
Legal.disclaimerRegionalUK: United Kingdom: This content does not constitute a financial promotion under FCA regulation. It is editorial content from a publication.
Legal.disclaimerRegionalBrazil: Brazil: This service is not registered with the CVM. Content is educational and informational only.
Legal.disclaimerSourcesContent: Financial data is sourced from Yahoo Finance API and public sources. Prices may be delayed. We do not guarantee the accuracy or timeliness of this data.
